title: NYC DOB — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Department of Buildings (DOB) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the DOB website (www.nyc.gov/site/buildings), the legacy application layer (BIS Web / DOB NOW / eFiling), and the DOB NYC Open Data datasets. The GeographySpine is the recurring property-location key set that stitches every DOB record together.

Borough.description: Borough name. In Open Data this appears as 'Borough' (job filings), 'BOROUGH' (permit issuance), or 'BORO' (violations, sometimes as a 1-5 code).

BoroughCode.description: Numeric borough code as used in BIN/BBL and some violation extracts: 1=Manhattan, 2=Bronx, 3=Brooklyn, 4=Queens, 5=Staten Island.

Coordinates.description: Point geometry. In Open Data these arrive as text (gis_latitude/gis_longitude on legacy extracts) or number (latitude/longitude on DOB NOW extracts).

GeographySpine.description: The recurring NYC property-geography key set shared by nearly every DOB record. Column names vary by extract (e.g. community___board vs community_board vs community_board(number); gis_council_district vs council_district; gis_census_tract vs census_tract; gis_nta_name vs nta) but the concepts are constant.

communityBoard.description: Community District / Community Board (Open Data 'Community - Board', 'Community Board').

councilDistrict.description: City Council district (Open Data 'COUNCIL DISTRICT' / 'Council District').

censusTract.description: US Census tract (Open Data 'CENSUS TRACT' / 'Census Tract (2020)').

nta.description: Neighborhood Tabulation Area (Open Data 'NTA' / 'Neighborhood Tabulation Area (NTA) (2020)').

bin.description: Building Identification Number, the 7-digit DOB building key (Open Data 'Bin #', 'BIN', 'BIN_NUMBER', 'Permit BIN').

Address.description: A NYC street address as decomposed across DOB extracts (House #, Street Name, Zip).

PartyReference.description: A person or business on a filing/permit — owner, applicant, permittee, or filing representative. DOB decomposes these into many first/last/business-name columns.

licenseType.description: e.g. GC (General Contractor), PE, RA, Master Plumber (Open Data 'Permittee's License Type').
